settingPanelHotkeyDesc: Use SiYuan command hotkey format, for example Ctrl+F11. Changes apply immediately.
settingReplaceHotkeyDesc: Used to open the panel with the replace row visible, for example Ctrl+F12.
settingDefaultReplaceVisibleDesc: When opening from the find entry, show the replace row by default.
settingRememberPositionDesc: Save the dragged panel position and restore it next time.
settingMinimapDesc: Show the document minimap beside the panel while searching.
settingPreloadSelectionDesc: When opening the panel, fill the search box with the current editor selection if any.
settingIncludeCodeBlockDesc: Include code blocks in the current document when computing search and replace matches.
settingDebugLogDesc: Print extra search and replace diagnostics to the console when enabled.
settingPreserveCaseDesc: Adjust replacement text to follow the matched text casing, for example foo→bar, FOO→BAR, Foo→Bar.
selectionOnly: Find and replace within selection only
replaceCurrentUnsupported: The current match spans complex formatting and cannot be replaced directly yet.
replaceAllConfirm: Replace {count} matches in the current document?
selectionOnlyNoScope: Selection-only mode is enabled, but there is no active selection
regexHelpNote: Regex search is supported. Replacement text is still inserted literally, so backreferences like $1 and \1 are not supported yet.
regexHelpDescWhitespace: matches install and plugin with whitespace between them
